The Problem

AI is trapped in the browser.

Users are tired of "Chatbots" that forget context, sell their data, and refuse to work.

They don't want a chat window.
They want an Operating System.

03 / 16

The Solution

Intelligence at the Kernel.

Luca OS is a native application layer that sits above your OS. It sees your screen, reads your files, and executes code directly on your machine.

LocalData Privacy
AgenticCode Execution
InfiniteContext Window
04 / 16

The Opportunity

From Chat to Agency.

The AI revolution is shifting from "Asking Questions" to "Executing Missions." Luca OS is the orchestration layer for this trillion-dollar transition.

$1.8T TAM (Knowledge Economy)
$450B SAM (AI Agent Market)

Offline Security

The Neural
Center.

07 / 16

The Anchor

Luca Prism.

Software is ephemeral. Hardware is permanent.

The Prism is a dedicated neural node for your desk. Always-on, holographic presence that keeps your agent alive even when the laptop is closed.
